cast.name: Frank Aldridge
cast.character: Well Dressed Male Witness - Wilson's Garage

plot outline: An adaptation of F. Scott Fitzgerald's Long Island-set novel, where Midwesterner Nick Carraway is lured into the lavish world of his neighbor, Jay Gatsby. Soon enough, however, Carraway sees through the cracks of Gatsby's nouveau riche existence, where obsession, madness, and tragedy await.
title: The Great Gatsby

distributors.name: Columbia TriStar Warner Filmes de Portugal
